'''âd-y-v-g''' ('''kadayvegoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cake|cake]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-y-v-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cake|cake]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âd-y-v-g
|-
! Lemma
| kadayvegoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidayvegoko|thidayvegoko]] || [[word:jidayvegoko|jidayvegoko]] || [[word:shidayvegoko|shidayvegoko]] || [[word:kidayvegoko|kidayvegoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudayvegoko|thuthudayvegoko]] || [[word:jujudayvegoko|jujudayvegoko]] || [[word:shushudayvegoko|shushudayvegoko]] || [[word:kukudayvegoko|kukudayvegoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
